title: coilostylis lacertina
intro: Coilostylis lacertina, also known as lizard flag or lizard tail, is a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Coilostylis lacertina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Coilostylis lacertina is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions with medications.
